campaign: 240 Deer Rd - Gilpin County 3-Bedroom Listing Kit
ecosystemNote: This listing kit lands into the ShopLocal campaign-kit ecosystem (same industry-kit pattern as Stan's Auto). The customer link is hosted at hipcribs.5280.menu and feeds the sliding real-estate carousel at the bottom of the registercall.com home page.
sourcePattern: CoNewsPress ShopLocal industry-kit spine adapted for a real-estate listing: customer-facing interactive price estimator, campaign-kit landing with landing-page builder, registercall.com home-page carousel feed, newsletter block, banner set, social copy, print/direct mail/audio handoff, production kanban, owner SMS, drip sequence, and SEO mapping.

integration.type: Manus-built React SPA, mirrored offline and rebranded
adoptedFeatures: Adjustable price-factor sliders (sqft, baths, year, condition, amenities)
integration.adoptedBrandGraphics: Customer-facing pages rebranded to a HipCribs high-end housing aesthetic derived from the fleurish.mag brand: warm near-black surfaces, gold accents, Cormorant / Marcellus / Crimson Pro / DM Sans type system. The embedded estimator is a compiled bundle and retains the source calculator UI inside its frame.

audience: Gilpin County and Front Range 3-bedroom home shoppers
Sellers and FSBO owners benchmarking list price
Relocation and second-home buyers researching Black Hawk / Central City / Rollinsville
Local shoppers who want a price estimate before contacting an agent
positioning: A HipCribs real-estate listing inside the ShopLocal campaign-kit ecosystem: a self-serve price estimate at hipcribs.5280.menu that also surfaces in the sliding real-estate carousel at the bottom of the registercall.com home page, turning browsers into qualified agent conversations.

links.note: Only two links ship. The campaign-kit landing contains the customer-facing landing-page builder + the customer link. Buyers receive customerLink only.

registercallCarousel.purpose: Sliding real-estate carousel embedded at the bottom of the registercall.com home page. Functionally equivalent to the listing estimator site, presented as a bottom-of-page carousel that links each card to the customer link (hipcribs.5280.menu).
registercallCarousel.registercallComponent: wrc-frontend already has RealEstateBanner.tsx + carousel components; this is a drop-in, not a modification of the live repo unless approved.

officialFacts.market: Gilpin County RE-1 / Historic Mountain Communities
officialFacts.claimGuidance: Recommended list price is derived from the estimator's own model. Verify against the actual property condition, square footage, and amenities before publishing any list price.

dnsStatus: not-provisioned (5280.menu = Plesk self-hosted DNS; do NOT use GoDaddy/Cloudflare)

internalOnly.note: Listing-agent dashboard is internal. Do not link it from buyer-facing pages.

artRoute: Source estimator OG screenshot referenced by URL; premium generated artwork not required.
